summary: Bug fix verified: Course filtering by turma atendimento_programa (AEE vs regular) is working correctly. Regular turma shows 9 courses (8 regular + 1 integral), AEE turma shows only 2 AEE courses. Case-insensitive matching and multisseriada series field handling confirmed working.
critical_code_review_comments: The filteredCourses memo in useStaff.js (lines 318-383) correctly implements the filtering logic
Case-insensitive comparisons using .toLowerCase() on both turma.atendimento_programa and curso.atendimento_programa
Multisseriada turmas correctly use the 'series' array field for grade level matching
Integral courses only shown when school has atendimento_integral=true AND turma is regular
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: 11 courses (8 regular, 1 integral, 2 AEE), 3 classes (TURMA MULTI 1-2-3, TESTE 2, AEE), 1 school (ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA with atendimento_integral=true)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for course filtering by turma type is VERIFIED. The fix is in /app/frontend/src/hooks/useStaff.js lines 318-383 (filteredCourses memo). Key test scenarios: (1) Regular turma shows 9 courses (8 regular + 1 integral), (2) AEE turma shows only 2 AEE courses. Professor RICLEIDE has lotação for year 2026 in ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA.

bug_verification.original_issue: When allocating professor to turma, components dropdown should filter by turma's atendimento_programa
bug_verification.fix_applied: Updated filteredCourses memo to: (1) filter by atendimento_programa, (2) use series field for multisseriadas, (3) case-insensitive comparisons
bug_verification.verification_result: SUCCESS - All filtering scenarios working correctly

backend_api.GET /api/courses: PASS - Returns 11 courses (8 regular, 1 integral, 2 AEE)
backend_api.GET /api/classes: PASS - Returns 3 classes with atendimento_programa field
backend_api.GET /api/schools: PASS - Returns ESCOLA TESTE MULTISSERIADA with atendimento_integral=true
backend_api.GET /api/school-assignments: PASS - Returns lotação for RICLEIDE in year 2026

frontend_ui_flow.step_3_click_alocacoes_tab: PASS - Switched to 'Alocações de Professores' tab
frontend_ui_flow.step_5_select_professor: PASS - Selected RICLEIDE DA SILVA GONÇALVES
frontend_ui_flow.step_8_test_aee_turma: PASS - AEE turma shows only 2 AEE courses
